notes: Prices are MONTHLY Test (evaluation) subscription fees, not one-time: $25K=$150, $50K=$170, $75K=$245, $100K=$330, $150K=$360.
One-time $130 PRO activation fee on passing (waived by lifetime-discount promos). Failed-test reset is a separate fee (~$100 — verify on live site).
Trailing drawdown is a FIXED USD amount per tier, not a percent: $25K=$1,500, $50K=$2,000, $75K=$2,500, $100K=$3,000, $150K=$4,500. maxLossPct left null because one percentage can't represent it.
Profit target 6% of account at every tier ($1,500 / $3,000 / $4,500 / $6,000 / $9,000).

No daily loss limit (removed across all phases Jan 2025). Drawdown is end-of-day trailing on Test, updating at 5 PM ET on the closing balance; sources disagree on whether the PRO funded account switches to intraday trailing — confirm on the live dashboard.
Profit split 80% on the PRO funded account, rising to 90% on PRO+ after the first payout clears the buffer. There is no max payout cap and no minimum trading-day requirement for withdrawals on PRO.
Futures only (CME / CBOT / NYMEX / COMEX). Positions must be flat before the daily 5 PM ET close — no true overnight or weekend holding.
News trading is restricted around high-impact releases (FOMC / NFP / CPI) during the Test — verify current blackout windows.
Withdrawals typically clear within ~1 business day via ACH/Plaid (US) or PayPal/Wise (international).
Figures cross-checked across multiple June 2026 third-party reviews; takeprofittrader.com blocks automated capture, so confirm pricing and rules on the live site/dashboard before relying on them.
Trustpilot 4.4/5 from ~9,250 reviews as of June 2026 (per public aggregate).
